title: Shower Curtain Pole Extendable Tension Rod Curtain Poles No Drilling Shower Curtain Rail Extendable Pole for Bathroom, Window, Door, Closet, 135-200cm White(Diameter 25 mm)
features: 【New Design for ANTI-SLIP & RUST-OFF】Aiitomg Shower Curtain Pole is Designed with Delicate and Anti-Slip Head, Which is Made of Soft & New Non-Slip Design. Made of High Quality Stainless Steel & Paint to Keep Off The Rust
【Durable & Strong Enough】Shower Curtain Pole is Made of Thicker Spring and the Cap's Dimeter is 52mm Which Made The Shower Curtain Rail is Durable & Strong
【Service】 Provides Confident Replacement and Service. If Your Rods Was Damaged During Transportation, Please Contact Us to Get a New One or Refund.
【Package Content & Attention】1PC 135-200CM curtain poles no drilling, please make sure to install according to the fifth picture and the installation video in the left photo gallery.
【Multi-purpose】 The Shower Poles Extendable No Drill Suitable for Shower Room & Bathroom, Closets, Windows, Doorway, etc. Can be Used Indoor and Outdoor.
